name: EThOS - Ethics and Technologies Of the Self
description: Research center focused on the ethical dimensions of technology and artificial intelligence, examining how technologies shape human agency and self-understanding.

name: LUCI - Logic Uncertainty Computation and Information
description: Research group focused on the logical and computational foundations of uncertainty, information processing, and reasoning under incomplete information.

name: SPIKE - Structured and Probabilistic Intelligent Knowledge Engineering
description: Research group specializing in knowledge engineering, structured reasoning, and probabilistic approaches to artificial intelligence.

name: KIDS - Knowledge, Information and Data Science
description: Research group focused on knowledge representation, information processing, and data science applications in artificial intelligence.
